visual_edit_stale_reason.message: Visual-edit browser workbench proof is still missing; local source receipts prove only loopback preview/apply/undo plumbing.

targets.rule: Canonical starter target for future state-runtime browser receipts only; readiness metadata does not execute a browser.
Canonical starter target for future source-owned island browser receipts only; hosted/provider adapter proof remains separate.

browser_receipt_proof_targets.rule: These canonical starter routes guide browser receipt collection; readiness output does not claim a browser ran.

native_event_browser_binder_stale_reason.message: Native-event browser binder proof is missing; local catalog and MDN freshness receipts are not real browser listener execution proof.

state_runtime_browser_stale_reason.message: State-runtime browser proof is missing; source-owned reactivity receipts are not real browser state, derived, effect, and action replay proof.

server_action_replay_ledger_stale_reason.message: Server-action replay ledger receipt is missing; route/action runtime remains foundation-only until the local production-preview ledger receipt is regenerated.

route_handler_provider_stale_reason.message: Hosted provider route-handler replay receipt is missing; run the route-handler provider replay collector against a real hosted URL, then import the JSON receipt.

production_http_stale_reason.message: Production HTTP local wire replay proof is missing; ETag, 304, Range, method guard, and precompressed asset behavior are source-only until the receipt is regenerated.

production_http_tcp_preview_stale_reason.message: Production HTTP TCP preview proof is missing; local wire replay does not prove the running dx preview TCP server.

primitive_proof_stale_reason.message: This WWW project is missing its local primitive foundation receipt, but a current source-owned repo-root primitive proof exists. Regenerate project-local receipts before treating this app as current.

island_abi_stale_reason.message: Islands ABI proof is missing; camelCase clientLoad/clientVisible/clientIdle/clientOnly support remains source-only until the receipt is regenerated.

island_browser_stale_reason.message: Source-owned island browser replay proof is missing; import a real browser island receipt before claiming local island runtime execution.

bundle_partition_stale_reason.message: Public-runtime/evidence bundle partition proof is missing; production output cleanliness remains source-only until the receipt is regenerated.

bundle_provider_replay_stale_reason.message: Hosted provider public/evidence bundle replay receipt is missing; run the bundle replay collector against a real hosted URL, then import the JSON receipt.

same_machine_performance_stale_reason.message: Same-machine throughput raceboard proof is missing; tiny-static remains source-only until WWW/Next/Svelte/Astro are measured on this machine.

same_machine_performance_raceboard.claim_boundary: This is a local same-machine runtime raceboard only; it is not a global fastest-world claim or Astro tiny-static payload parity proof.

local_replay_receipts.rule: Current local receipts are sufficient for the project-approved relative WWW release-ready claim; hosted/provider breadth remains tracked as post-release proof hardening.
